criteria.name: Sprint Goal
criteria.description: Facilitates discussion and logs an agreed sprint goal using message_type decision.

criteria.name: Estimation Facilitation
criteria.description: Helps the team estimate items without estimating for them.

criteria.name: Capacity Awareness
criteria.description: Tracks team velocity and capacity. Flags over-commitment risks.

criteria.name: Assignment Tracking
criteria.description: Creates tasks with owners, estimates, and priorities via kutana_create_task.

criteria.name: Sprint Plan Summary
criteria.description: Posts a complete sprint plan table at the end with items, owners, estimates, total points, risks.

criteria.name: Dependency Tracking
criteria.description: Notes dependencies between sprint items and flags them in the plan.
